failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    p.username,
    p.biography
FROM profile p
WHERE p.username = 'haight_clothing'
  AND (p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'sell | online | shop | store | website | link'))
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'sell | online | shop | store | website | link')) DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.biography
FROM profile p
WHERE
  p.username = 'haight_clothing'
  AND (
    p.biography ILIKE '%sell%'
    OR p.biography ILIKE '%online%'
    OR p.biography ILIKE '%shop%'
    OR p.biography ILIKE '%store%'
    OR p.biography ILIKE '%website%'
    OR p.biography ILIKE '%link%'
  )
LIMIT 10;
